0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","$L2",null,{"toc":[{"depth":1,"url":"#template-stacked-browse","title":"Template: stacked-browse"},{"depth":2,"url":"#key-patterns","title":"Key patterns"},{"depth":2,"url":"#how-to-load-sub-files","title":"How to load sub-files"}],"children":[["$","$L3",null,{"children":"Template: stacked-browse"}],["$","$L4",null,{"children":"Generates a master-detail screen with two stacked po-table components:"}],["$","$L5",null,{"children":[["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h1","id":"template-stacked-browse","children":"Template: stacked-browse"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Generates a master-detail screen with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"two stacked po-table components"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Top browse (master): user navigates rows with ArrowUp/Down; selecting a row loads its items in the detail browse below."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Bottom browse (detail): shows items of the selected master row; supports multi-select via checkboxes."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Tab key switches keyboard focus between the two browses."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Compact filter bar with \"Remover Filtro\" always visible in the master header."}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use cases: SC5/SC6 (orders + items), invoice lines, stock entries, any ERP master-detail where both levels need independent keyboard navigation."}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"two-panel-browse"}]," for side-by-side reconciliation/matching.\nUse ",["$","code",null,{"children":"master-detail"}]," for inline expandable rows (no separate detail browse needed)."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","hr",null,{}],"\n",["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","id":"key-patterns","children":"Key patterns"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Pattern"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Implementation"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Active browse indicator"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"border-top-color"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":".browse-cabecalho"}]," — never ",["$","code",null,{"children":"outline"}]," (outline creates a scroll artifact at the bottom edge of the browse)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Keyboard navigation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"@HostListener('window:keydown')"}]," routes ArrowUp/Down to active browse; Tab switches browse"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Scroll sync"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"_scrollRowIntoView()"}]," walks DOM to find real scrollable ancestor; callers use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"setTimeout(..., 50)"}]," NOT 0ms"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No page scroll"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"masterHeight"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"detailHeight"}]," computed signals using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_winH() - OFFSET"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Focus ring suppression"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"::ng-deep *:focus, ::ng-deep *:focus-visible \\{ outline: none \\}"}]," inside each browse container"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Compact filter bar"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"--font-size: 12px"}]," CSS variable on ",["$","code",null,{"children":".filtros-bar"}]," cascades to all PO-UI children"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Remover Filtro"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Always rendered + always red; cursor and underline-hover only when ",["$","code",null,{"children":"isFiltrado()"}]," is true"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Demo data"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"const DEMO_*"}]," at top of component file;
